test-case.name: BulkScope_OutOfRangeIndex_WarnsAndDoesNotModifyExistingWeights
test-case.output: LayerInputSourceWeightBuffer: BulkScope.SetWeight の (layerIdx=5, sourceIdx=0) が範囲外のため書込をスキップします (LayerCount=1, MaxSourcesPerLayer=1)。 LayerInputSourceWeightBuffer: BulkScope.SetWeight の (layerIdx=0, sourceIdx=9) が範囲外のため書込をスキップします (LayerCount=1, MaxSourcesPerLayer=1)。 LayerInputSourceWeightBuffer: BulkScope.SetWeight の (layerIdx=-1, sourceIdx=-1) が範囲外のため書込をスキップします (LayerCount=1, MaxSourcesPerLayer=1)。

test-case.name: SetWeight_LayerIdxBeyondLayerCount_LogsWarningAndLeavesWeightsUnchanged
test-case.output: LayerInputSourceWeightBuffer: SetWeight の (layerIdx=2, sourceIdx=0) が範囲外のため書込をスキップします (LayerCount=2, MaxSourcesPerLayer=3)。

test-case.name: SetWeight_NegativeIndices_LogsWarningAndLeavesWeightsUnchanged
test-case.output: LayerInputSourceWeightBuffer: SetWeight の (layerIdx=-1, sourceIdx=0) が範囲外のため書込をスキップします (LayerCount=1, MaxSourcesPerLayer=1)。

test-case.name: SetWeight_OutOfRange_DoesNotAdvanceDirtyTick
test-case.output: LayerInputSourceWeightBuffer: SetWeight の (layerIdx=9, sourceIdx=0) が範囲外のため書込をスキップします (LayerCount=1, MaxSourcesPerLayer=1)。

test-case.name: SetWeight_SourceIdxBeyondMaxSourcesPerLayer_LogsWarningAndLeavesWeightsUnchanged
test-case.output: LayerInputSourceWeightBuffer: SetWeight の (layerIdx=0, sourceIdx=5) が範囲外のため書込をスキップします (LayerCount=2, MaxSourcesPerLayer=2)。
